seo.description: RECPL supplies a wide range of material testing instruments, surveying equipment, soil testing devices, NDT instruments, and laboratory apparatus across India.

hero.title: Material Testing Equipment & Instrument Supply
hero.summary: Your One-Stop Source for Quality Testing & Surveying Instruments
hero.description: RECPL supplies a wide range of material testing instruments, surveying equipment, soil testing devices, laboratory apparatus, and NDT equipment for industries, construction companies, laboratories, and government agencies across India.

intro.description: In addition to our consultancy, testing, and inspection services, Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd. (RECPL) is a trusted supplier of material testing instruments, surveying equipment, soil testing devices, laboratory apparatus, and NDT equipment. Whether you are setting up a new testing laboratory, upgrading your field equipment, or procuring instruments for a specific project, RECPL delivers quality products at competitive prices with expert after-sales support.

cta.title: Looking for a specific instrument? Need bulk pricing?
